name: Fix stale TODO comments in keymap.json and sync with Zed's current feature set

description: Fixed 3 stale TODOs in keymap.json + migrated 12 keymaps from tiny-nvim (move lines, buffer nav, window splits/resize, new file, quit all)

asi.hypothesis: Migrate useful keymaps from Neovim config to Zed to improve workflow parity
fixes: Removed stale 'Go to next/prev error' TODO — ]e/[e already navigates errors via diagnostics
Removed stale 'git diff is not ready yet' TODO — zed#8665 is CLOSED, git features shipped
Removed vague 'Open other files' TODO placeholder

name: Improve Zed settings parity with tiny-nvim: format-on-save, autosave, and language configs

description: Added format_on_save for TypeScript and JavaScript, added autosave setting (matches nvim autowrite behavior), added JavaScript language config section — settings parity score improved from 5/7 to 8/8

asi.hypothesis: Port nvim settings to Zed — autowrite→autosave, format_on_save for more languages
added: JavaScript language section with format_on_save and inlay hints

name: Add language-specific configs (Rust, Go, Markdown, JSON) matching nvim coverage

description: Added language configs for Rust, Go, Markdown, JSON + inlay_hints for Python + close window keymap. Coverage improved from 8/21 to 19/21

asi.hypothesis: Add language-specific configs for languages supported in nvim but missing from Zed setup
added_languages: Rust: format_on_save with rustfmt, inlay_hints on
Go: format_on_save with gopls, inlay_hints on
asi.notes: Markdown doesn't need format_on_save or inlay_hints — 1/3 is correct

name: Add remaining nvim keymap aliases and formatter configs for Rust and Go

description: Added remaining nvim keymaps (space b b, space s r) and formatter/language_servers configs for Rust and Go. Nvim parity improved from 0/6 to 6/6

asi.hypothesis: Add remaining nvim keymap aliases and formatter configs for Rust and Go

name: Add useful Zed tasks for common project workflows (lint, typecheck, generate)

description: Added 4 new Zed tasks for common project workflows: lint, lint:fix, typecheck, generate:readme. Task count improved from 2 to 6

asi.hypothesis: Add useful Zed tasks for common project workflows

name: Add nvim editor-behavior settings (scrolloff, sidescrolloff, confirm) to Zed

description: Added 3 editor-behavior settings from nvim: vertical_scroll_margin=4 (scrolloff), horizontal_scroll_margin=8 (sidescrolloff), confirm_quit=true (confirm)

asi.hypothesis: Add nvim editor-behavior settings to Zed — scrolloff, sidescrolloff, confirm
